mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CREATED_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TASK WHERE STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND TASK_STATUS = 'DONE' AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND CREATED_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CREATED_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
AND CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId}

SELECT C.TITLE AS groupKey, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TASK T JOIN TASK_CATEGORY C ON C.CATEGORY_ID = T.CATEGORY_ID WHERE T.STATUS <> 'DELETED' AND T.USER_ID = #{userId} AND T.CREATED_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND T.CREATED_DATE < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1 AND C.STATUS <> 'DELETED' GROUP BY C.TITLE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
